type_check_context(3) Library Functions Manual type_check_context(3)

NAME

type_check_context - Check if a type string is actually registered in the named registry.

SYNOPSIS

Data Fields


const char * type_to_find
size_t type_len
bool found

Detailed Description

Check if a type string is actually registered in the named registry.

Parameters

type_str The type string to validate (e.g., "thread", "mutex", "socket")
type_len Length of the type string

Returns

true if the type exists in any registered entry

Queries the registry programmatically to ensure the type is actually registered, preventing false positives on random "word/word" text patterns.

Definition at line 36 of file log/named.c.
